summary: Added a governed relation verifier enrollment/rotation posture for the Cloudflare Site Registry package. The new preflight helper produces inert dry-run/ready/blocked plans, requires registry-owner/operator standing, gates live D1 mutation behind explicit execute/admin approval, and never plans remote secret mutation. Rotation now supersedes old verifier records, creates a new active verifier, retains audit evidence, and avoids raw secret serialization. Tests cover first enrollment planning, non-owner refusal, live-mutation gating, rotation, revocation, and raw-secret exclusion.
residuals: The verifier enrollment posture is exposed as a package preflight/seed helper, not as a public Worker enrollment route.
No Cloudflare Worker secret was created, rotated, or set.
Route authentication replacement remains assigned to task 1443 and was intentionally not changed here.
